meaning: n.(有伸缩挖掘装置的)锄耕机
examples: Blake was a goateed young backhoe operator whom Carol had met across the counter at the license bureau.
A loader is not the most efficient machine for digging as it cannot dig very deep below the level of its wheels as a backhoe can.
Last year, an anchor weighing seven stones was also discovered at the site after excavators uncovered curved timbers that a backhoe brought up.
The boy's father had been working on the pit with a backhoe that afternoon, Carpenter said.
Backhoe: an excavator in which the bucket faces the operator and is pulled towards him.
